title: Upon Tuck. Epig.
content:
At post and pair, or slam, Tom Tuck would play
    This Christmas, but his want wherewith says nay.
meaning:
"Upon Tuck. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
